hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" <<< "$(cat)"); for p in ".env" "schema.d.ts" "compose.override" "vendor/" "node_modules/"; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "Fichier protégé: $p" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'
bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" <<< "$(cat)"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.php ]]; then docker compose exec -T php vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix "${FILE#*/api/}" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" <<< "$(cat)"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then docker compose exec -T pwa npx prettier --write "${FILE#*/pwa/}" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
